title: nemcia retusa
intro: Nemcia retusa, also known as the cutleaf coneflower, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nemcia retusa include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Herbal preparations of Nemcia retusa can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
